'''Ba'Har''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Coyn system/Legends|Coyn system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The name "Ba'Har" meant "Battle Blade" in the [[Coynite language]]. Ba'Har was a multicolored [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with a small band of rings, the remains of a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] torn apart by [[Gravity/Legends|gravitational]] stresses.

{{Planet-stub}}
